title: acilepis pseudosutepensis
intro: Acilepis pseudosutepensis is a plant species within the Asteraceae family, native to the Western Ghats of India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acilepis pseudosutepensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Acilepis pseudosutepensis include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
